title: Isla's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Little Isla discovers the magic of seasons through peek-a-boo games with nature's changing elements - flowers hiding in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in autumn, and snowflakes in winter.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where are you, little flowers?

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes peeks behind a tree trunk in spring. Soft pastel pink and yellow tulips are partially hidden behind green grass, waiting to be discovered. The scene shows a gentle spring meadow with budding trees and morning dew.
illustration.alt: Girl with red hair playing peek-a-boo with spring flowers

pages.text: There you are! Pretty spring flowers saying hello!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes claps her hands as colorful spring flowers pop up from behind the grass. Pink tulips, yellow daffodils, and white daisies fill the same meadow scene in full spring bloom with soft pastel colors.
illustration.alt: Girl discovering spring flowers in a meadow

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where are you, dancing butterflies?

illustration.description: The same meadow now in bright summer colors. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes looks around a flowering bush. Colorful butterflies hide behind vibrant summer wildflowers in brilliant oranges, blues, and purples under a bright sunny sky.
illustration.alt: Girl searching for butterflies in summer flowers

pages.text: There you are! Beautiful butterflies dancing in the warm sun!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes laughs as orange, blue, and yellow butterflies flutter all around the summer meadow. The scene bursts with bright summer colors and abundant blooming flowers under golden sunshine.
illustration.alt: Girl watching butterflies dance in summer meadow

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where are you, colorful leaves?

illustration.description: The same meadow transformed to autumn warmth. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes peers around a tree with golden and orange autumn foliage. Fallen leaves in warm reds, oranges, and yellows are scattered and partially hidden around the scene.
illustration.alt: Girl looking for autumn leaves in fall scenery

pages.text: There you are! Autumn leaves twirling and swirling down!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes reaches up as red, orange, and golden leaves dance through the air around her. The autumn meadow glows with warm colors as leaves fall gently from the trees above.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where are you, fluffy snowflakes?

illustration.description: The meadow now covered in winter snow with cool blues and whites. Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes bundled in a cozy coat looks up at the winter sky. Delicate snowflakes fall gently, some hiding behind bare tree branches in the peaceful winter scene.
illustration.alt: Girl looking for snowflakes in winter landscape

pages.text: There you are! Soft snowflakes floating down like magic!

illustration.description: Isla with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes catches snowflakes on her mittens as they fall all around her. The winter meadow sparkles with fresh snow and cool blue shadows, completing the seasonal cycle in the same peaceful location.
illustration.alt: Girl catching snowflakes in winter wonderland

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Isla find in spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, Isla plays peek-a-boo with pretty flowers that pop up from the grass!

questions.question: What dances in the summer sun?
questions.explanation: Beautiful butterflies dance around Isla in the warm summer meadow!

questions.question: What falls down in winter?
questions.explanation: Soft, fluffy snowflakes float down like magic in winter!
